text:
Hello, everyone! My name is Bruno and I'm a Data Scientist from Portugal with both a BSc and MSc in Statistics.
I have been programming in R for 7 years, almost 4 professionally, and I currently work in developing internal R and C libraries for my company.
Joined this slack because would love to start contributing to R core base libraries!
Nice to meet you all.
